nasb.text: Moses stretched out his staff toward the sky, and the Lord sent thunder and hail, and fire ran down to the earth. And the Lord rained hail on the land of Egypt.

esv.text: Then Moses stretched out his staff toward heaven, and the Lord sent thunder and hail, and fire ran down to the earth. And the Lord rained hail upon the land of Egypt.

cnv.text: 摩西把手杖向天一伸，耶和華就打雷下雹，有火落在地上；耶和華使冰雹降在埃及地上。

ccb.text: 摩西向天伸出手杖，耶和华就发出雷电和冰雹，火光飞向大地。耶和华在埃及降下冰雹。
